prompt: I need a prompt for debugging React performance issues in my component

assertions.name: walks_all_steps
assertions.description: Should guide user through all 6 steps of the COSTAR framework

assertions.name: produces_mega_prompt
assertions.description: Should compile answers into a structured Mega-Prompt

assertions.name: includes_persona
assertions.description: Should include Role/Persona section with expertise level

assertions.name: includes_context_section
assertions.description: Should include Context section with code/background

assertions.name: includes_examples_section
assertions.description: Should include Examples section with Input/Output pairs

assertions.name: includes_constraints
assertions.description: Should include Constraints/Guardrails section with positive framing
